name: codex-ralph-loop
description: Open-source Codex product harness with Ralph-compatible loops, compressed context, preflight checks, and asset-aware workflows.

interface.shortDescription: PRD-driven product harness with compressed context, checks, design assets, and Ralph-compatible loops
interface.longDescription: Use SummitHarness to turn requirements into a project-local Codex runtime with preflight validation, compressed context packets, design-aware asset tracking, deterministic checks, review gates, and optional Stop-hook self-loops.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap SummitHarness in this repository and run preflight
Refresh the compressed context packet and continue the active build loop
Turn a planning brief into a design-aware Codex product harness
